option.name: chatSessions
option.value: {"400e64c2-0503-4347-a968-dc3b73ade6bd":{"id":"400e64c2-0503-4347-a968-dc3b73ade6bd","name":"Follow Button State Sync Issue Between Screens and ViewModel","timestamp":1759158918988,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"\u003cuser_query\u003e\nI\u0027m trying to make an app that has a follow button on a screen with a list of users, and also on the profile of a user. I\u0027m updating the followed state in a datastore, and right now I\u0027m having an issue where when I follow on the list screen, the followedState doesn\u0027t update. I\u0027ve tried to make the list of users a flow because I thought that was a good idea, so that when the flow gets updated down stream, the UI will react, a bit like what is working for the profile screen. to do this Ive kept a list of users as a flow in my repositoryimplemenation, but I\u0027m struggling with how to get it to be observed by my viewmodel(s)\n\u003c/user_query\u003e"}]},{"role":"assistant","content":[]}]}}
